_comment: Owner Action Queue — the single most important list. Only what needs the OWNER right now. Ordered by priority (high first). priority: high | medium | low. kind: confirm | configure | review | merge | test | decide | provide. Use honest 'if still open / if still active' wording for conditional items. Mission Control tracks these; it does not execute them.

items.title: GrowVerse backend / login recovery (Launch #1) — bring growverse-api up
items.where: Your authenticated machine → Fly (growverse-api) + Vercel (GrowVerse project). Not runnable from Mission Control.
items.action: growverse.dev login still 404s because no healthy backend is wired. From your terminal: set the correct DATABASE_URL → deploy growverse-api → confirm /health = 200 → verify POST /api/game/players → only then set Vercel BACKEND_URL to that healthy backend → redeploy Vercel → test login on growverse.dev. The correct backend is the growpod Python API, NOT frontiernext.
items.blocks: GV-001 and everything downstream — login on growverse.dev

items.title: Merge PR #30 — 404 /lab on the Vercel deploy
items.action: Closes the public /lab exposure on devbiz.vercel.app (one-line vercel.json). Owner-only, no auto-merge. After Vercel redeploys, re-check devbiz.vercel.app/lab/ → should be 404 while / still loads.
items.blocks: DBZ-001 — /lab staying private on the Vercel mirror

items.title: Verify / configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/*
items.where: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Access → Applications (not configured in this repo)
items.action: Open /lab/mission-control/ in a private window. EXPECTED: a Cloudflare Access sign-in appears first. If the dashboard loads with NO prompt, Access is not configured — add /lab and /lab/* to an Access app with Allow = your email(s). There is no app-level login or basic-auth in the repo; the gate lives only in Cloudflare. See docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md.
items.blocks: DBZ-004 — safe sharing of any deployed /lab link

items.title: Review the open GrowVerse + Agent-Feed drafts
items.where: KudbeeZero/devbiz · PR #29 (Vercel readiness), #31 (living-plant audit), #32 (Agent Feed Inbox)
items.action: Docs/audit lanes that feed GrowVerse Launch #1 and the Agent Feed Inbox. Each is a draft awaiting a merge/hold decision. Merging them also turns the Focus Board's 'pending' doc links live.
items.blocks: Focus Board doc links going live; GV/DBZ context being canonical on main

items.title: Confirm the correct frontier-al folder/repo before Aether Wing Phase 1 (Launch #2)
items.action: Tell the next agent exactly where Aether Wing should be built. No FRONTIER / Aether Wing gameplay starts until this is confirmed.

items.title: Browser-check the new Mission Feed page, then approve/merge
items.action: Open the feed on your phone + desktop: confirm System Pulse tiles, Owner Action Now, the filterable Mission Packets board, Agent Reports (incl. the inbox sample), the PR/Branch feed with its 'not wired yet' banner, Build/Deploy + Security placeholders, and the Wiring Map. Verify source labels, freshness, and honesty pills (nothing reads 'live'). Then approve/merge (owner-only).
items.blocks: Mission Control agent/feed layer going live behind Access

items.title: Decide on a server-side GitHub feed Worker (to make the PR/CI feed real)
items.where: Owner-only infra lane — needs explicit OWNER-OK (PR_FLOW.md §11a)
items.action: The PR/branch/CI feed is honestly labelled 'not wired'. Making it live needs a Cloudflare Worker holding the GitHub token as a secret (never client-side), caching + rate-limiting, preview/production separation, and a last-verified timestamp. Greenlight this as its own phased lane when ready.
items.blocks: Live PR/CI/deploy feeds in Mission Control

items.title: Browser-check the Focus Board on this PR's preview, then merge
items.where: This PR's branch preview · /lab/mission-control/ (Focus Board section near the top)
items.action: Open the dashboard on your phone: confirm the Focus Board renders the three project cards (GrowVerse / FRONTIER / Devbiz) with status chips, blocker, owner action, expandable next-actions + backlog, the 'pending PR' doc pills, and the devbiz-memory brain note. Then merge (owner-only).
items.blocks: DBZ-005 area — Mission Control v2 Focus Board

items.title: Decide on the older Devbiz draft PRs
items.where: KudbeeZero/devbiz · PR #6 (AI concierge), #20 (Code Lens spec), #14 (ledger reconcile)
items.action: Each is a draft awaiting an owner decision (merge, hold, or close). None block the active launch sequence.
